title: Kin’emon’s Mystery Continues

scene: The scene focuses on kin’emon’s mystery continues, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're still no match for them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh? Are you gonna betray us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3

summary: Kin’emon’s Mystery Continues. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
